overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a drive through Night City at dusk. The camera moves along palm-lined streets with neon signs and cyberpunk architecture, following a red sports car before turning right at an intersection. The scene features warm sunset lighting mixed with neon glows from billboards and wet asphalt reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined urban boulevard with neon billboards

events.description: dark sedan passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving straight down the palm-lined avenue at moderate speed, passing neon signs on the right

large circular neon billboard with glowing advertisements
low-rise commercial buildings with weathered facades
utility poles and overhead power lines crisscrossing the street
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Driving down a wide palm-lined boulevard in a cyberpunk city at dusk. Neon billboards glow on the right while low-rise buildings line the left, with distant skyscrapers visible ahead. A dark sedan passes by on the right side of the road around the 6-second mark.

agents.ego_description: following a red sports car down the avenue toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: elevated highway overpass crossing perpendicular to the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing straight along the avenue, following a red sports car that appeared ahead. The road approaches an overpass bridge with the downtown skyline visible in the background. Palm trees continue to line both sides of the street as the vehicle maintains speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: side street with hedge wall and commercial storefronts

events.description: vehicle turns right at the intersection onto a perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing down a side street with pedestrians visible on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall hedge wall running along the left side of the street
street sign reading 'Woodhaven' mounted on a pole
commercial buildings with glowing neon signage and advertisements
distinctive tall futuristic tower with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the intersection onto a narrower side street with a hedge wall on the left. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalk on the right, and neon storefront signs illuminate the street. The tall cyberpunk tower remains visible in the distance as the vehicle continues down the new route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit cyberpunk boulevard that eventually transitions into a narrower, bustling side street. It begins by gliding down a wide, palm-lined avenue at dusk, passing low-rise buildings and glowing billboards as a dark sedan streaks past on the right. As the camera maintains its forward momentum, it begins following a red sports car toward an overpass bridge with the towering downtown skyline looming in the distance. The scene then shifts as the vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection, moving away from the open boulevard and onto a tighter road flanked by a hedge wall and pedestrians on the sidewalk. Finally, the perspective settles into this denser urban corridor, where neon storefront signs illuminate the path while the distant cyberpunk tower remains a focal point on the horizon.
